title: Automation Migration Webinar: Everything You Need to Know

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re hosting a live webinar to help marketplace partners and private app builders prepare for the automation migration to monday’s new workflows-based infrastructure.

If your app uses legacy “integration for sentence builder” features, this session is for you.

In this webinar, you’ll get a live, end-to-end migration demo, a walkthrough of the latest improvements based on partner feedback, and practical guidance to help you migrate with confidence. We’ll also cover common questions and edge cases we’re seeing from partners, so you can avoid surprises and keep your app available in new automation experiences.

If you haven’t started the migration process yet, please visit the community announcement for full details. Have questions? Ask them in our dedicated support group and our team will be happy to help.

Join us live to see the migration in action and get your questions answered directly by the monday team.
